title: Open the HMI Calculations Tilt Tray Overview Screen
summary: Access the HMI Calculations screen from the ACB System screen to view Tilt Tray overview information, including system operations, bin statistics, and tipper statistics.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when an operator needs to open the HMI Calculations screen from the ACB System screen to view Tilt Tray overview information and related operational statistics.
not_for: Do not use this procedure for recovery if the HMI Calculations screen does not open, because the source does not provide alternate navigation or recovery steps.
Do not use this procedure for accessing other HMI screens such as Statistics, API, Building Overview, or Tipping Station screens.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Navigate from the ACB System screen to the HMI Calculations screen and verify the destination screen is displayed.

safety_notes: This source describes an HMI navigation action only.
No lockout/tagout, production stop, or physical intervention requirements are stated in the source.

system_preconditions: The ACB System screen is available and displayed.

visual_references.description: ACB System screen reference for the starting screen.
HMI Calculations screen reference showing the destination screen and its displayed information.

steps.title: Start at the ACB System screen
steps.purpose: Establish the documented starting point for navigation to the HMI Calculations screen.
steps.instruction: Go to the "ACB System" screen before attempting to open HMI Calculations.
steps.expected_result: The ACB System screen is displayed and ready for screen selection.
steps.healthy_condition: The operator is on the ACB System screen.
steps.failure_condition: The ACB System screen is not displayed or is not available as the starting screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The ACB System overview screen used as the starting point for navigation.
System HMI screen associated with the ACB System overview and status display.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the ACB System screen cannot be reached or confirmed.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Press HMI CALCULATIONS and the "ACB System" screen to access the "Tilt Tray" overview screen.

steps.title: Press HMI CALCULATIONS
steps.purpose: Open the HMI Calculations screen from the ACB System screen.
steps.instruction: On the ACB System screen, press "HMI CALCULATIONS" to access the Tilt Tray overview screen.
steps.healthy_condition: Selecting HMI CALCULATIONS opens the destination screen associated with the Tilt Tray overview.
steps.failure_condition: Pressing HMI CALCULATIONS does not open the documented screen.

actions.label: Open HMI Calculations
actions.exact_action: Press "HMI CALCULATIONS" to access the "Tilt Tray" overview screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The HMI Calculations screen that is opened from the ACB System screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the HMI Calculations screen does not open from the ACB System screen as documented.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Press HMI CALCULATIONS and the "ACB System" screen to access the "Tilt Tray" overview screen.

steps.title: Verify the HMI Calculations screen is displayed
steps.purpose: Confirm that the correct destination screen has been opened.
steps.instruction: Verify that the displayed screen is the "HMI Calculations" screen and that it presents information related to system operations, bin statistics, and tipper statistics.
steps.expected_result: The displayed screen matches the HMI Calculations screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The screen shown is the HMI Calculations screen and it provides information pertaining to system operations, bin statistics, and tipper statistics.
steps.failure_condition: A different screen is displayed, or the expected HMI Calculations information is not visible.

actions.label: Verify destination screen
actions.exact_action: Verify that the displayed screen is the "HMI Calculations" screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Figure 4-6 HMI Calculations screen and the information it displays for system operations, bin statistics, and tipper statistics.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the displayed screen is not the HMI Calculations screen.
Stop or escalate if the expected HMI Calculations information is not available.
Escalate if additional recovery or alternate navigation is needed, because the source does not provide it.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "HMI Calculations" screen provides information pertaining to system operations, bin statistics, and tipper statistics.

success_criteria: The HMI Calculations screen opens from the ACB System screen.
The operator can view Tilt Tray overview information.
The displayed screen shows information pertaining to system operations, bin statistics, and tipper statistics.
healthy_conditions: The ACB System screen is available as the starting point.
Pressing HMI CALCULATIONS opens the documented destination screen.
The HMI Calculations screen is displayed with system operations, bin statistics, and tipper statistics information.
failure_conditions: The ACB System screen cannot be confirmed as the starting screen.
The HMI Calculations screen does not open from the ACB System screen as documented.
The displayed screen is not the HMI Calculations screen.
The source provides no alternate navigation or recovery steps.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the HMI Calculations screen does not open from the ACB System screen as documented.
Escalate if the displayed screen does not match the HMI Calculations screen.
Escalate when alternate navigation or recovery is required, because the source does not provide additional recovery steps.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Destination HMI Calculations screen used to view system operations, bin statistics, and tipper statistics.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Press HMI CALCULATIONS and the "ACB System" screen to access the "Tilt Tray" overview screen.
The "HMI Calculations" screen provides information pertaining to system operations, bin statistics, and tipper statistics.

missing_details: The source wording for the navigation instruction is awkward and does not provide a more detailed button-by-button sequence beyond pressing HMI CALCULATIONS from the ACB System screen.
The source does not provide alternate navigation, troubleshooting, or recovery steps if the screen does not open.
The source does not provide an estimated completion time.
The source does not specify whether production stop or LOTO is required.
